instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `nif` (numeric if) that evaluates an expression once and dispatches to one of three branches based on whether the value is positive, zero, or negative.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (- A B)))
            (COND ((PLUSP #:G1) :POSITIVE) ((ZEROP #:G1) :EQUAL) (T :NEGATIVE)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (- A B)))
            (COND ((PLUSP #:G112) :POSITIVE) ((ZEROP #:G112) :EQUAL)
                  (T :NEGATIVE)))

--- stderr ---
